2 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: 00 = Not specified, other patient residence not identified below 
01 = Home 
03 = Nursing facility (long-term care facility) 
04 = Assisted living facility 

06 = Group home (e.g., congregate residential foster care) 
09 = Intermediate care facility /intellectual disability) 
10 = Residential Substance Abuse Treatment Facility 
11 = Hospice 
Null/missing 

COMMENT: CMS requires Part D plans to maintain pharmacy networks that are sufficient to ensure convenient 
access
